title: VoxScript
subtitle: Real-time Audio Transcription App
description: A real-time voice-to-text desktop application powered by Whisper AI, featuring multi-language support, live progress tracking, and automatic transcription saving with a modern PyQt6 interface.

title: MagicVolumeCam
subtitle: Gesture-Based Volume Controller
description: A computer vision application that allows users to control music volume using hand gestures in real-time, combining MediaPipe hand tracking with a modern PyQt6 GUI and Pygame audio control.
focus: Computer Vision · Real-time Interaction · Human-Computer Interface

title: FaceSense AI
subtitle: Real-Time Face Analysis System
description: A real-time face analysis desktop application featuring face mesh visualization, emotion detection, and face recognition using MediaPipe and DeepFace within a PyQt6-based interface.

title: Assignment Manager
subtitle: Student Assignment Management Platform
description: A full-stack student assignment management system featuring a Flask REST API, Telegram bot integration, and a web-based dashboard for managing assignments and file uploads.
built_with: Python · Flask · MySQL · Telegram Bot API · HTML/CSS/JS

title: ShadowGate
subtitle: Offline Survival Toolkit for Restricted Internet
description: A local-first survival toolkit designed for restricted or offline internet environments, combining a Telegram bot, proxy management, automation scripts, and an offline-friendly architecture.
built_with: Python · SQLite · Telegram Bot API · PowerShell · Batch

title: RQ-Code
subtitle: Professional QR Management System
description: A professional desktop QR management ecosystem built with PyQt6 and SQLite, featuring secure encrypted QR codes, dynamic UUID-based resolution, expiration control, one-time QR logic, real-time camera scanning, and a modular architecture for scalability and maintainability.
built_with: Python · PyQt6 · SQLite · OpenCV · cryptography · qrcode · Matplotlib · uuid
focus: Security · Modular Architecture · QR Management · Analytics · Real-Time Scanning
